job_orders.title: ACI-002 Data Model Foundation
job_orders.mission: Establish the JSON-backed execution data model with Job Order as the root object, supporting truth states, governance artifacts, and operator continuity for NOPE Lite.

current_truth.statement: Repository foundation (ACI-001) is complete. Express application runs with health endpoint. JSON storage directory exists but contains no execution objects.

next_truth.statement: All core execution JSON files exist with validated schemas. Seed Job Order loads without errors. Validation scripts and CI enforce data integrity.
next_truth.rationale: Data model must be stable before ACI-003 introduces execution UI.

target_truth.statement: NOPE Lite has a complete MVP data model where every execution artifact links to a Job Order and can be loaded, validated, and extended by subsequent ACIs.
criteria: Six JSON storage files populated and validated
Seed Job Order demonstrates all required object types

human_summary.summary: ACI-002 is building the data layer. The seed Job Order tracks this ACI itself as a meta-demonstration of the model.
human_summary.author: operator

risks.description: Schema changes before ACI-003 may require seed data migration.
